description: Style Noteremanika combines edgy style with flattering fits in all their creations, including this trendy top. With excellent styling and a well designed look, this simple tee will get the temperatures soaring when paired with a pair well fitted jeans and flat strappy sandals.Product DetailsYellow T-shirt, has a square neckline with a curved centre, ruffles and lace detailing at the centre of the neckline, puffed sleeves with elasticated cuffs and gathers from below the necklineMaterial and CareCottonMachine wash warmDo not bleachFlat dry onlyUse cold ironSize and Fit Regular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
